summary: 9 unread this morning, with a few things that need real action. That Texas vehicle registration email has been sitting unread since January — your 2014 Mazda's reg expired in December 2025, so you're now 3+ months overdue, handle that today. Your PayPal card ending in 7376 is also expired and needs updating, your FAA drone registration is coming up for renewal within 180 days, and Aiden's Microsoft Family Safety report flagged 2 search terms worth a look. No emails need a direct reply, but the registration and PayPal items are the most urgent.

items.subject: It's time to renew your registration
items.snippet: Your 2014 Mazda (VIN ending 1256) registration expired end of December 2025 — this notice was sent January 4th and is still unread, making it ~3 months overdue.

items.subject: Update your expired card information for PayPal
items.snippet: Your card ending in 7376 has expired and needs to be updated in your PayPal account.

items.subject: UAS Registration Renewal Reminder
items.snippet: Your UAS (drone) registration will expire within 180 days — renew via FAADroneZone.
